title: Mixtral 8x7B Released
description: Mistral AI released Mixtral 8x7B, a sparse Mixture of Experts (MoE) model that outperformed GPT-3.5 and Llama 2 70B on most benchmarks. With only 12.9B active parameters per token from 46.7B total, it delivered exceptional efficiency. The model matched or exceeded GPT-3.5 Turbo on standard benchmarks while being faster and cheaper to run.
